--- a/train.py

     # Compute normalization

     target_mean = targets.mean().item()

     target_std = targets.std().item()

-    print(f'Target mean: {target_mean:.4f}, std: {target_std:.4f}')

+    print(f'Target mean: {target_mean:.4f}, std: {target_std:.4f}', flush=True)

+    for g in train_data:

+        g.y = (g.y - target_mean) / target_std

+    for g in val_data:

+        g.y = (g.y - target_mean) / target_std

+

+    # Data loaders

     batch_size = 64

-    # Model config - moderate size
